revision.comment: Changed protection settings for "[[Template:R from miscapitalisation]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]] ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from miscapitalisation
  |name=From a miscapitalisation
  |from=a capitalisation error
  |info=The correct form is {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|<big>'''{{{1|{{{of}}}}}}'''</big>|given by the target of the redirect}}.
** This redirect is made available to aid [[H:S|searches]] or to maintain [[H:L|links]]. Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the correct form without using a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] hiding the correct details.
** This template tags redirects with the {{c|Redirects from miscapitalisations‎}} category, a subcategory of {{c|Redirects from incorrect names}}, so template {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should not be used with this template.
  |all category=Redirects from miscapitalisations
}}<includeonly>{{Main other
|{{{Category|[[Category:{{#ifexpr: {{#ifeq: {{{2}}}    | printworthy | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{printworthy}}}  | yes | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{unprintworthy}}} | no | 1 | 0 }}
                |Printworthy
                |Unprintworthy
        }} redirects]]}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from miscapitalisation
  |name=From a miscapitalisation
  |from=a capitalisation error
  |info=The correct form is {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|<big>'''{{{1|{{{of}}}}}}'''</big>|given by the target of the redirect}}.
** This redirect is made available to aid [[H:S|searches]] or to maintain [[H:L|links]]. Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the correct form without using a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] hiding the correct details.
** This template tags redirects with the {{c|Redirects from miscapitalisations‎}} category, a subcategory of {{c|Redirects from incorrect names}}, so template {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should not be used with this template.
  |all category=Redirects from miscapitalisations
}}<includeonly>{{Main other
|{{{Category|[[Category:{{#ifexpr: {{#ifeq: {{{2}}}    | printworthy | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{printworthy}}}  | yes | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{unprintworthy}}} | no | 1 | 0 }}
                |Printworthy
                |Unprintworthy
        }} redirects]]}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from miscapitalisation
  |name=From a miscapitalisation
  |from=a capitalisation error
  |info=The correct form is {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|<big>'''{{{1|{{{of}}}}}}'''</big>|given by the target of the redirect}}.
** This redirect is made available to aid [[H:S|searches]] or to maintain [[H:L|links]]. Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the correct form without using a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] hiding the correct details.
** This template tags redirects with the {{c|Redirects from miscapitalisations‎}} category, a subcategory of {{c|Redirects from incorrect names}}, so template {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should not be used with this template.
  |all category=Redirects from miscapitalisations
}}<includeonly>{{Main other
|{{{Category|[[Category:{#ifexpr: {{#ifeq: {{{2}}}    | printworthy | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{printworthy}}}  | yes | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{unprintworthy}}} | no | 1 | 0 }}
                |Printworthy
                |Unprintworthy
        }} redirects]]}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from miscapitalisation
  |name=From a miscapitalisation
  |from=a capitalisation error
  |info=The correct form is {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|<big>'''{{{1|{{{of}}}}}}'''</big>|given by the target of the redirect}}.
** This redirect is made available to aid [[H:S|searches]] or to maintain [[H:L|links]]. Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the correct form without using a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] hiding the correct details.
** This template tags redirects with the {{c|Redirects from miscapitalisations‎}} category, a subcategory of {{c|Redirects from incorrect names}}, so template {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should not be used with this template.
  |all category=Redirects from miscapitalisations

                                or {{#ifeq: {{{printworthy}}}  | yes | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{unprintworthy}}} | no | 1 | 0 }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from miscapitalisation
  |name=From a miscapitalisation
  |from=a capitalisation error
  |info=The correct form is {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|<big>'''{{{1|{{{of}}}}}}'''</big>|given by the target of the redirect}}.
** This redirect is made available to aid [[H:S|searches]] or to maintain [[:en:H:L|links]]. Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the correct form without using a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] hiding the correct details.
** This template tags redirects with the {{c|Redirects from miscapitalisations‎}} category, a subcategory of {{c|Redirects from incorrect names}}, so template {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should not be used with this template.
  |all category=Redirects from miscapitalisations
}}<includeonly>{{Main other
|{{{Category|[[Category:#ifexpr: {{#ifeq: {{{2}}}    | printworthy | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{printworthy}}}  | yes | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{unprintworthy}}} | no | 1 | 0 }}
                |Printworthy
                |Unprintworthy
        }} redirects]]}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from miscapitalisation
  |name=From a miscapitalisation
  |from=a capitalisation error
  |info=The correct form is {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|<big>'''{{{1|{{{of}}}}}}'''</big>|given by the target of the redirect}}.
** This redirect is made available to aid [[:en:H:S|searches]] or to maintain [[:en:H:L|links]]. Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the correct form without using a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] hiding the correct details.
** This template tags redirects with the {{c|Redirects from miscapitalisations‎}} category, a subcategory of {{c|Redirects from incorrect names}}, so template {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should not be used with this template.
  |all category=Redirects from miscapitalisations
}}<includeonly>{{Main other
|{{{Category|[[Category:#ifexpr: {{#ifeq: {{{2}}}    | printworthy | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{printworthy}}}  | yes | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{unprintworthy}}} | no | 1 | 0 }}
                |Printworthy
                |Unprintworthy
        }} redirects]]}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from miscapitalisation
  |name=From a miscapitalisation
  |from=a capitalisation error
  |info=The correct form is {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|<big>'''{{{1|{{{of}}}}}}'''</big>|given by the target of the redirect}}.
** This redirect is made available to aid [[:en:H:S|searches]] or to maintain [[:en:H:L|links]]. Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the correct form without using a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] hiding the correct details.
** This template tags redirects with the {{c|Redirects from miscapitalisations‎}} category, a subcategory of {{c|Redirects from incorrect names}}, so template {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should not be used with this template.
  |all category=Redirects from miscapitalisations
}}<includeonly>{{Main other
|{{{Category|[[Category:#ifexpr: {{#ifeq: {{{2}}}    | printworthy | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{printworthy}}}  | yes | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{unprintworthy}}} | no | 1 | 0 }}
                |Printworthy
                |Unprintworthy
        }} redirects]]}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>

</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from miscapitalisation
  |name=From a miscapitalisation
  |from=a capitalisation error
  |info=The correct form is {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|<big>'''{{{1|{{{of}}}}}}'''</big>|given by the target of the redirect}}.
** This redirect is made available to aid [[:en:H:S|searches]] or to maintain [[:en:H:L|links]]. Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the correct form without using a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] hiding the correct details.
** This template tags redirects with the {{c|Redirects from miscapitalisations‎}} category, a subcategory of {{c|Redirects from incorrect names}}, so template {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should not be used with this template.
  |all category=Redirects from miscapitalisations
}}<includeonly>{{Main other
|{{{Category|[[Category:#ifexpr: {{#ifeq: {{{2}}}    | printworthy | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{printworthy}}}  | yes | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{unprintworthy}}} | no | 1 | 0 }}
                |Printworthy
                |Unprintworthy
        }} redirects]]}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from miscapitalisation
  |name=From a miscapitalisation
  |from=a capitalisation error
  |info=The correct form is {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|<big>'''{{{1|{{{of}}}}}}'''</big>|given by the target of the redirect}}.
** This redirect is made available to aid [[:en:H:S|searches]] or to maintain [[:en:H:L|links]]. Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the correct form without using a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] hiding the correct details.
** This template tags redirects with the {{c|Redirects from miscapitalisations‎}} category, a subcategory of {{c|Redirects from incorrect names}}, so template {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should not be used with this template.
  |all category=Redirects from miscapitalisations
}}<includeonly>{{Main other
|{{{Category|[[Category:#ifexpr: {{#ifeq: {{{2}}}    | printworthy | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{printworthy}}}  | yes | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{unprintworthy}}} | no | 1 | 0 }}
                |Printworthy
                |Unprintworthy
        }} redirects]]}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from miscapitalisation
  |name=From a miscapitalisation
  |from=a capitalisation error
  |info=The correct form is {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|<big>'''{{{1|{{{of}}}}}}'''</big>|given by the target of the redirect}}.
** This redirect is made available to aid [[:en:H:S|searches]] or to maintain [[:en:H:L|links]]. Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the correct form without using a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] hiding the correct details.
** This template tags redirects with the {{c|Redirects from miscapitalisations‎}} category, a subcategory of {{c|Redirects from incorrect names}}, so template {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should not be used with this template.
  |all category=Redirects from miscapitalisations
}}<includeonly>{{Main other
|{{{Category|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
</noinclude>
<noinclude>
[[Category:#ifexpr: {{#ifeq: {{{2}}}    | printworthy | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{printworthy}}}  | yes | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{unprintworthy}}} | no | 1 | 0 }}
                |Printworthy
                |Unprintworthy
        }} redirects]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}

  |name=From a miscapitalisation

                                or {{#ifeq: {{{printworthy}}}  | yes | 1 | 0 }}

</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24957526818|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from miscapitalisation
  |name=From a miscapitalisation
  |from=a capitalisation error
  |info=The correct form is {{#if:{{{1|{{{of|}}}}}}|<big>'''{{{1|{{{of}}}}}}'''</big>|given by the target of the redirect}}.
** This redirect is made available to aid [[:en:H:S|searches]] or to maintain [[:en:H:L|links]]. Pages that use this link should be updated to link directly to the correct form without using a [[WP:piped link|piped link]] hiding the correct details.
** This template tags redirects with the {{c|Redirects from miscapitalisations‎}} category, a subcategory of {{c|Redirects from incorrect names}}, so template {{tl|R from incorrect name}} should not be used with this template.
  |all category=Redirects from miscapitalisations
}}<includeonly>{{Main other
|{{{Category|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>

{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

[[Category:#ifexpr: {{#ifeq: {{{2}}}    | printworthy | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{printworthy}}}  | yes | 1 | 0 }}
                                or {{#ifeq: {{{unprintworthy}}} | no | 1 | 0 }}
                |Printworthy
                |Unprintworthy
        }} redirects]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
